this_class    $Object$2
super_class   java/lang/Object
access_flags  0x0021
interfaces    [Action]
method        <init> ()V 0x0001
  code        max_stack=1 max_locals=1
    0000 aload_0
    0001 invokespecial Method(java/lang/Object.<init>:()V)
    0004 return

  code        max_stack=2 max_locals=1
    0000 ldc "SAM void!"
    0002 getstatic Field(java/lang/System.out:Ljava/io/PrintStream;)
    0005 swap

    0009 return
